baseline_uniform_random_expected.note: expected accuracy guessing for a uniform sequence mod p

constant.note: no degree-0 polynomial fits ALL training points; this is the interpolant through the first 1 -> generalization is the honest test

affine_linear.note: no degree-1 polynomial fits ALL training points; this is the interpolant through the first 2 -> generalization is the honest test

quadratic.note: no degree-2 polynomial fits ALL training points; this is the interpolant through the first 3 -> generalization is the honest test

cubic.note: no degree-3 polynomial fits ALL training points; this is the interpolant through the first 4 -> generalization is the honest test

geometric_a_cpow_k.note: c chosen by best TRAINING fit (search over F_p^*), so train_accuracy is optimistic; held-out is the honest number
